Package com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.client

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    IAgentAdminConnector
    Interface of the object that is used for establishing connections with the 1C:Enterprise 8 administration server
    IAgentAdminConnectorFactory
    Interface of the factory for creating objects that are used for establishing connections with the 1C:Enterprise administration server
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    AgentAdminConnector
    Implementation of the object that is used for establishing connections with the administration server
    AgentAdminConnectorFactory
    Factory for creating objects that are used for establishing connections with the 1C:Enterprise administration server
